programme.desc: Going Underground brings our viewers the news they wonâ€™t get on other networks. We examine both underground and mainstream issues from a fresh and alternative perspective. With Afshin Rattansi.

programme.title: Headline News
programme.desc: Latest news update.

programme.title: In Coversation with Salman Khurshid
programme.desc: Far from just another interview show - this is conversation shaped by experience.Â Because foreign policy is not just theory. It must be lived. Hosted by Indiaâ€™s former External Affairs Minister and one of the countryâ€™s most respected legal minds, Salman Khurshid, the show offers a rare window into how the world is understood by those who have helped shape it. The seasoned statesman draws on decades of diplomacy, law, and international negotiations as host. Don't miss the conversation.

programme.title: Headline News
programme.desc: Latest news update.

programme.title: India, Russia and the World with Runjhun Sharma
programme.desc: Two civilizational powers. The worldâ€™s largest democracy, India, and the worldâ€™s largest nation, Russia - moving like chess pieces across an ever-changing global board.

programme.title: Headline News
programme.desc: RT India Head of News Runjhun Sharma's weekly podcast is a deep-dive into pressing global issues through the lens of India and Russia.

programme.title: Lumumbaâ€™s Africa
programme.desc: The show draws on the host's years of covering foreign policy and high-level engagements from New Delhi, Moscow and beyond.Â For too long, Western narratives have shaped global and Indian discourse, often sidelining voices that do not fit a single mold.

programme.title: Lumumbaâ€™s Africa
programme.desc: The show draws on the host's years of covering foreign policy and high-level engagements from New Delhi, Moscow and beyond.Â For too long, Western narratives have shaped global and Indian discourse, often sidelining voices that do not fit a single mold.

programme.title: GUmebyar Budoyo # BATIK IMOGIRI,GENTONGAN, BAKARAN PATI
Ki Anom Dwijo Kangko # Semar Mbangun Khayanga3
Mees Salome | Loveland Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Embark on a captivating musical journey with Mees SalomÃ© at Loveland Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Xenia | Radio Intense | Atlas Weekend virtual stage | Kyiv (Ukraine)
programme.desc: Xenia exclusive live for Radio Intense at Atlas Weekend virtual stage.

programme.title: Tenishia | Chasing Sunsets - Cruise Control | St. Paul Island (Malta)
programme.desc: Set sail on a sonic adventure with Tenishia at the helm, as the â€˜Chasing Sunsets - Cruise Controlâ€™ event takes you around the picturesque St. Paul Island in Malta.

programme.title: Gregor Tresher (live) | 909 Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Prepare for a live electronic extravaganza with Gregor Tresher at 909 Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Steve Aoki | UNTOLD Festival 2023 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Get ready to party with the one and only Steve Aoki at UNTOLD Festival 2023 in Cluj-Napoca, Romania!

programme.title: Nervo | Hydeout: The Prelude | Netherlands
programme.desc: NERVO turned up the heat at Hydeout: The Prelude in the Netherlands with a high-energy set packed with vibrant vocals, festival anthems, and unstoppable party vibes. The dynamic duo brought their signature mix of pop-infused EDM and infectious charisma to the virtual stage, making it a standout moment in the Hydeout series.

programme.title: Morten | UNTOLD Festival 2022 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Morten playing on Mainstage at UNTOLD Festival 2022 in Cluj-Napoca, Romania.

programme.title: Wankelmut | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Pacha On Air wi the the Berlin based house DJ and producer Wankelmut, recorded at Pacha Munich.

programme.title: Deadmau5 | Space Opening | Ibiza
programme.desc: Deadmau5 lives up to all the hype and more with a mind blowing liveset in the Flight Area of the Space Opening 2009.

programme.title: Away To: Faqra with VNSA - By Late Knights & Creative State | Beirut (Lebanon)
programme.desc: You are watching "Away To" with Factory People and Creative State. A series of socially distant musical gatherings with cool places and cool people. VNSA takes the lead.

programme.title: Pink Panda | Live at Master | Shanghai (China)
programme.desc: PINK PANDA, the DJ collective originating from the U.K. (est. 2012) have marked themselves as the major labelsâ€™ go to remixer production outfit over the past years. Alongside a strong catalog of official remixes for the likes of Ava Max, Bruno Mars, David Guetta, Dua Lipa, Meduza, P!nk and Sia, to name just a few, these Pandas are set to continue their journey.

programme.title: Deep Dish | THE BPM FESTIVAL 2020 | Beatport Stream | Costa Rica
programme.desc: Amazing performance by Deep Dish at The BPM Festival - Costa Rica 2020!

programme.title: Claptone | Pacha On Air - Bavarian State Opera | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Imagine youÂ´re taking a walk on a quiet Saturday evening in late Munich Summer, enjoying the peace and beauty of your city. And suddenly Claptone appears.

programme.title: Joe T Vannelli | Galeone Adriana Lampedusa | Italy
programme.desc: Dj set by Joe T Vannelli Live On Galeone Adriana Lampedusa in Sicily.

programme.title: Hernan Cattaneo b2b Nick Warren | Loveland Festival 2023 Part 1 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Embark on a celestial musical journey with Hernan Cattaneo and Nick Warren as they join forces for a captivating b2b set at Loveland Festival 2023 Part 1 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: The Martinez Brothers | Music On Festival | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: One of the most iconic electronic music duo in the scene, The Martinez Brothers, took over the decks and made sure no one stands still for a single second. Check out their immensely groovy set recorded at Music On Festival, Amsterdam.

programme.title: Matthias Tanzmann | 11 Years of Nights.ro | Bucharest (Romania)
programme.desc: Straight from his "Moon Harbour" label night at Sonar, Matthias Tanzmann touches down in Bucharest to headline Nights.ro 11 year anniversary party. And he truly rocks it with his very own blend of groovy, funky, body moving house jams.

programme.title: BLOND:ISH B2B YokoO | Daydreaming Experience at UNTOLD | Cluj Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: BLONDH:ISH and YokoO return to Daydreaming Experience, this time teaming up for an ecstatic b2b set during UNTOLD 2019. There's magic in the air for this set opening (part 1 2)

programme.title: Wildstylez, Bass Modulators, Coone, Isaac, Pavo, Luna and more | Defqon 1 Dragonblood | Netherlands
programme.desc: A powerhouse lineup featuring Wildstylez, Bass Modulators, Coone, Isaac, Pavo, Luna, and more unleashes pure hardstyle energy at Defqon.1 Dragonblood in the Netherlands. Explosive sets, epic visuals, and the raw spirit of the Q-dance nation collide in this unforgettable celebration of harder styles.

programme.title: Mahony | UNTOLD Festival 2023 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Dive into the beats with Mahony at UNTOLD Festival 2023 in Cluj-Napoca, Romania. Experience the magic of music in the heart of Romania. Don't miss out on this unforgettable moment!

programme.title: Mahony | UNTOLD Festival 2023 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Dive into the beats with Mahony at UNTOLD Festival 2023 in Cluj-Napoca, Romania. Experience the magic of music in the heart of Romania. Don't miss out on this unforgettable moment!

programme.title: Mahony | UNTOLD Festival 2023 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Dive into the beats with Mahony at UNTOLD Festival 2023 in Cluj-Napoca, Romania. Experience the magic of music in the heart of Romania. Don't miss out on this unforgettable moment!

programme.title: Mayze x Faria | Xpalces at Art House Botica | Amares (Portugal)
programme.desc: It was once one of the stopping points for those passing through Amares. Today it is a house that receives the art of several national and international artists. The venue has been chosen for another edition of Xplaces, Casa de Artes da Botica, located in Largo D. Gualdim Pais, in Amares-Braga.

programme.title: Joe T Vannelli | Tre Cime di Lavaredo Auronzo Dolomiti | Italy
programme.desc: This spectacular episode of the Joe T Vannelli DJ Set series is called "Dolomiti" and was recorded at Tre Cime di Lavaredo Auronzo Dolomiti in Italy. Enjoy the absolutely mind blowing views and stellar music by the Milano based artist!

programme.title: Alok | UNTOLD Festival 2021 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Alok live from UNTOLD Festival 2021. For the first time in Romania, the rising Brazilian artist amazed the crowd with his magical show on the mainstage.

programme.title: Juliet Sikora | Laute Wiese RECD. at Schlosshotel Hugenpoet | Essen (Germany)
programme.desc: DJ set by Juliet Sikora (Kittball Records, GER) recorded in front of historic German castle Hugenpoet in Essen, Germany.

programme.title: Tonio Barrientos | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Pacha On Air w Tonio Barrientos, recorded at Pacha Munich and in support of the iconic club currently closed due to the Covid Pandemic.

programme.title: Ruben de Ronde b2b Rodg | Armada Invites | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Ruben de Ronde b2b Rodg delivered a seamless back-to-back set at Armada Invites in Amsterdam, blending deep progressive grooves with uplifting trance energy. In the intimate Armada HQ setting, their synergy behind the decks created a journey of rhythm and emotion, showcasing the unique chemistry that makes their performances unforgettable.

programme.title: Marc Romboy | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Systematic Recordings head honcho Marc Romboy is the protagonist of the next Ritter Butzke Club excursion filmed at the Aquarium Berlin.

programme.title: Afrojack | Ultra Music Festival 2017 | Miami (USA)
programme.desc: Relive the electrifying performance of Afrojack at Ultra Music Festival 2017 in Miami, USA.

programme.title: Various Artists | Amsterdam Music Festival 2016 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Experience the sound of Amsterdam Music Festival in the heart of the Netherlands.From powerful drops to unforgettable night-time vibes, itâ€™s a taste of the festival that takes over Amsterdam during ADE.

programme.title: Xenia | Radio Intense | Susqueda Basement (Spain)
programme.desc: Xenia exclusive DJ set for Radio Intense at Susqueda Basement in Spain.

programme.title: Giuseppe Ottaviani | Transmission 2019 | Prague (Czech Republic)
programme.desc: Giuseppe Ottaviani live at Transmission, Prague 2019.

programme.title: Chelina Manuhutu | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: The Dutch-born Ibiza based producer and DJ Chelina Manuhutu is taking over the underground music scene through her groovy-powerful stream of high quality mixes. Tech house at its best!

programme.title: Tenishia | Chasing Sunsets at Dwejra Bay | Gozo (Malta)
programme.desc: Join the enchanting sunset journey with Tenishia at Dwejra Bay in Gozo, Malta.

programme.title: Joe T Vannelli | Vulcano Etna | Sicilia (Italy)
programme.desc: Joe T Vannelli on tour at Vulcano Etna in Sicilia, Italy.

programme.title: Joachim Pastor | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Joachim Pastor is the next protagonist of Ritter Butzke on Tour from Haus des Rundfunks.

programme.title: MÃ‹STIZA | Night Room TV at AlcÃ¡zar de los Reyes Cristianos | CÃ³rdoba (Spain)
programme.desc: Night Room TV alongsige Concurso Nacional de Arte Flamenco de CÃ³rdoba present the live DJ set perfomance by MÃ‹STIZA at the incredible gardens of AlcÃ¡zar de los Reyes Cristianos.

programme.title: Kind Of One | 909 Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Prepare for a captivating musical experience with Kind Of One at 909 Festival 2023 in Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Dubpaper | Dream Stream | Uncertain Future 001 | Cartagena (Spain)
programme.desc: A cry for freedom through musical expression in a magical place on the coast of Murcia.

programme.title: Dubpaper | Dream Stream | Uncertain Future 001 | Cartagena (Spain)
programme.desc: A cry for freedom through musical expression in a magical place on the coast of Murcia.

programme.title: Dubpaper | Dream Stream | Uncertain Future 001 | Cartagena (Spain)
programme.desc: A cry for freedom through musical expression in a magical place on the coast of Murcia.

programme.title: Matthias Tanzmann | 11 Years of Nights.ro | Bucharest (Romania)
programme.desc: Straight from his "Moon Harbour" label night at Sonar, Matthias Tanzmann touches down in Bucharest to headline Nights.ro 11 year anniversary party. And he truly rocks it with his very own blend of groovy, funky, body moving house jams.

programme.title: Away To: Desert Oasis with Nina Kraviz - By Late Knights & Creative State | Dubai (UAE)
programme.desc: The legendary Nina Kraviz works her magic at a desert oasis for a wild ride in the middle of nowhere.

programme.title: Jay Lumen | Sziget Festival 2019 | Hungary
programme.desc: Jay Lumen Live at Sziget Festival 2019.

programme.title: Luca Bacchetti | Ancient Future | Tuscany (Italy)
programme.desc: The ANCIENT FUTURE live stream, coming out of the stunning medieval Verrucole castle situated in the heart of Tuscany.

programme.title: Lari Luke | Parookaville 2020 | NRW (Germany)
programme.desc: Lari Luke brought her electrifying energy to Parookaville 2020 in NRW, Germany, delivering a high-impact set filled with bass-heavy drops and dynamic beats.

programme.title: Seth Troxler | Visionquest at Time Warp | Mannheim (Germany)
programme.desc: Seth Troxler starts off with a deep, dark, and freaky soundscape as the 'Visionquest 13' tour sets down in Mannheim and takes over area 4 of Time Warp.

programme.title: Roman Weber | Fairytale of the Knights | Riegersburg Castle | Austria
programme.desc: Roman Weber performs at the Riegersburg Castle on the edge of an extinct Vulcano.

programme.title: Andhim | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: The next excursion with Ritter Butzke is with Andhim at the Alte Forsterei Berlin in Germany. Their sound, which they self describe as â€œSuper Houseâ€ has become it`s very own genre built from their soul and passion- party proven and of reduced nature, organic with an emphasis on the finer detail.

programme.title: Carl Cox | Loveland Festival | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Carl Cox delivered an outrageous set at Loveland Festival. His talent coupled with the amazing Loveland production with compelling light show which fuse together flawlessly to create the perfect musical feeling. Get ready for an hour of top-notch tech house and techno tunes!

programme.title: Above & Beyond | Group Therapy 300 | Hong Kong
programme.desc: Above & Beyond brought their signature sound to Group Therapy 300 in Hong Kong, celebrating a major milestone in their journey with fans from around the globe.

programme.title: ATB | UNTOLD Festival 2022 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: ATB playing on mainstage at UNTOLD Festival 2022 in Cluj-Napoca, Romania.

programme.title: Nicky Romero & Friends | Protocol x ADE 2018 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Relive the excitement of Nicky Romero & Friends at Protocol X ADE 2018 in Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Dubfire | Space Opening | Ibiza
programme.desc: Dubfire at the opening of Space Ibiza firing up the main room with an incendiary mix of Techno, Tech House and Minimal!

programme.title: Solomun | Solomun + 1 at Pacha | Ibiza
programme.desc: Tickets to upcoming Pacha Barcelona events -- powered by Xceed

programme.title: ROOG & Erick E | Housequake 20 Years at Paradiso - Part 1 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Embark on a dynamic journey through two decades of house music as ROOG and Erick E kick off the celebration in Part 1 of Housequake's 20 Years at Paradiso, Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Mees Salome | Loveland Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Embark on a captivating musical journey with Mees SalomÃ© at Loveland Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Joris Voorn | Rejected Queensnight at Trouw | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Joris Voorn blows the house down with a truly epic set on Queensnight in Trouw Amsterdam, as club packed to the brim with happy people celebrates love for their Queen and electronic music. Beatrix and beats, so good together!

programme.title: Steve Lawler | Space Closing | Ibiza
programme.desc: Repeated torrential downbursts of rain do nothing to dampen the energy in the outside 'flight area' of the Space & We Love closing fiesta in Ibiza. Get ready for an epic ending of another great Ibiza season, with Steve Lawler in control!

programme.title: Richy Ahmed | Music On Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Dive into the rhythmic mastery of Richy Ahmed at Music On Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Robert Babicz | Chasing Sunsets at Popeye Village | Malta
programme.desc: Robert Babicz brought his signature blend of deep, emotive electronic music to Chasing Sunsets at Popeye Village in Malta.

programme.title: Robert Babicz | Chasing Sunsets at Popeye Village | Malta
programme.desc: Robert Babicz brought his signature blend of deep, emotive electronic music to Chasing Sunsets at Popeye Village in Malta.
